series_metadata.series_title: Analytical Toxicology Lab (ATL) Master Case Files
series_metadata.series_description: Including but not limited to accessions, instrumental, and method data, USA LIMS (Laboratory Information Management System) accession and reporting info, and Quality & Supportive Records (including Proficiency Testing Paperwork, obsolete equipment manuals and service records, temperature records, room access records, certificate of analysis, standard verification, calibration records, instrument tunes and calibrations). The Analytical Toxicology Lab (ATL) Administrative Professional 2 is the Record Retention Coordinator.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 5 years ; Electronic: 5 years, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
